---
title: "Roberto Park"
toc: false
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: latest-notes
    contents:
      - "notes/**/*.qmd"
      - "!notes/index.qmd"
    type: default
    fields: [title]
    max-items: 5
    sort: false
  - id: latest-blog
    contents:
      - "blog/*.qmd"
      - "!blog/index.qmd"
    type: default
    fields: [title]
    max-items: 5
---

{{< include assets/_aboutme.md >}}

## Explore

- **[Portfolio](portfolio.qmd)** — résumé, experience, tech stack
- **[Projects](projects/projects.qmd)** — case studies and code
- **[Notes](notes/index.qmd)** — technical notes across the data stack
- **[Blog](blog/index.qmd)** — long-form posts

## Recent notes

::: {#latest-notes}
:::

## Recent posts

::: {#latest-blog}
:::
